name: petatoe-enterprise-mobile
description: PETATOE Enterprise Mobile native wrapper based on Capacitor.

scripts.native:sync: npm run native:build:web && npm run native:install:faceid && npm run native:install:update && npx cap sync ios
scripts.native:open:ios: npm run native:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.native:ci:ios: npm run native:certify && npm run native:build:web && npx cap add ios && npm run native:install:faceid && npm run native:install:update && npx cap sync ios
